title: Aegis Policy File
description: Schema for Aegis security policy YAML files. Priority ranges: 10-22=deny, 50-70=allow, 90-100=escalate.

rules.description: Ordered list of security rules. Evaluated in priority order (lowest number first).

action.description: Action to take when the rule matches

severity.description: Severity level for deny/escalate rules. Empty string for allow rules.

confidence.description: Confidence score for this rule's decision (0.0-1.0)

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what triggers this rule and why it exists

remediation.description: How the user can fix or override this block

any_verb.description: Match if any of these verbs (command binaries) appear in the parsed command

all_verbs_safe.description: Match if all extracted verbs are in the known-safe set

tool_category.description: Match by MCP tool category (shell, file_read, file_write, file_delete, search, etc.)

verb_danger.description: Match on per-verb danger scores. Key is verb name or '*' for max. Value is a threshold operator.

or.description: At least one sub-condition must match (logical OR)

expr.description: expr-lang expression evaluated against the signal bundle. Use for complex logic that cannot be expressed with Tier 1 declarative fields.

rego.description: Inline Rego policy string for OPA evaluation (Tier 3)

rego_rule.description: Reference to a named Rego rule in a loaded policy bundle (Tier 3)

has_critical.description: True if any path targets a critical system location (/, /boot, /dev, /etc/shadow, etc.)

has_sensitive.description: True if any path targets a sensitive file (SSH keys, credential files, etc.)

all_in_project.description: True if all paths are within the current project working directory

score.description: Network risk score threshold. Must use operator form: { gt: 0.5 }. Range 0.0-1.0.

has_data_flag.description: True if the command includes a data upload flag (curl -d, --data, --upload-file, etc.)

has_stdin_pipe.description: True if stdin is being piped into a network command

has_hit.description: True if DLP scanning detected a secret or sensitive data pattern

all_test.description: True if all DLP hits are in test fixtures (e.g. testdata/, _test.go files)

encoding_detected.description: True if base64, hex, or unicode encoding was detected in the command

score.description: Evasion risk score threshold. Must use operator form: { gt: 0.3 }. Range 0.0-1.0.

Threshold.description: Threshold comparison operator. Use exactly one of: gt, gte, lt, lte.
